cost_types.name: Economic Cost
cost_types.description: Financial expenditure or economic resources consumed by a decision.

cost_types.name: Energy Cost
cost_types.description: Energy or computational resources required to execute an action.

cost_types.name: Time Cost
cost_types.description: Time spent by agents or systems as a consequence of a decision.

cost_types.name: Risk Cost
cost_types.description: Potential negative outcomes or exposure to uncertainty generated by a decision.

cost_types.name: Opportunity Cost
cost_types.description: Loss of alternative possibilities when a decision selects a specific path.

cost_types.name: Reputational Cost
cost_types.description: Impact on trust, credibility, or perceived reliability of an agent.

cost_types.name: Environmental Cost
cost_types.description: Impact on physical environments or ecosystems produced by an action.
